import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Find yellow pyramid on the grid (next state)
    pyr_mask_next = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    pyr_count_next = jnp.sum(pyr_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y_next = jnp.sum(yy * pyr_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_next, 1.0)
    pyr_x_next = jnp.sum(xx * pyr_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_next, 1.0)

    # Find yellow pyramid on the grid (current state)
    pyr_mask_cur = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    pyr_count_cur = jnp.sum(pyr_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y_cur = jnp.sum(yy * pyr_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_cur, 1.0)
    pyr_x_cur = jnp.sum(xx * pyr_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_cur, 1.0)

    # Find green square on the grid
    sq_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    sq_count = jnp.sum(sq_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    sq_y = jnp.sum(yy * sq_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count, 1.0)
    sq_x = jnp.sum(xx * sq_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count, 1.0)

    agent_y_next = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_next = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_y_cur = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_cur = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # Holding status
    holding_next = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_cur = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_next_f = holding_next.astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_cur_f = holding_cur.astype(jnp.float32)

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # === Phase 1: Not holding pyramid — guide agent toward pyramid ===
    dist_agent_to_pyr_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - pyr_y_next) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - pyr_x_next)
    dist_agent_to_pyr_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - pyr_y_cur) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - pyr_x_cur)

    # Progress toward pyramid (positive if getting closer)
    progress_to_pyr = (dist_agent_to_pyr_cur - dist_agent_to_pyr_next) / max_dist

    # === Phase 2: Holding pyramid — guide agent toward green square ===
    dist_agent_to_sq_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - sq_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - sq_x)
    dist_agent_to_sq_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - sq_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - sq_x)

    # Progress toward square (positive if getting closer)
    progress_to_sq = (dist_agent_to_sq_cur - dist_agent_to_sq_next) / max_dist

    # === Milestone: pickup event ===
    just_picked_up = holding_next & (~holding_cur)
    pickup_bonus = jnp.where(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(0.5), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # === Milestone: putdown event ===
    just_put_down = (~holding_next) & holding_cur
    # Check if pyramid is now adjacent to square
    dist_pyr_to_sq_next = jnp.abs(pyr_y_next - sq_y) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_next - sq_x)
    placed_adjacent = (dist_pyr_to_sq_next < 1.5) & (pyr_count_next > 0.5)
    putdown_bonus = jnp.where(just_put_down & placed_adjacent, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))
    # Small penalty for putting down in wrong place
    putdown_penalty = jnp.where(just_put_down & (~placed_adjacent), jnp.float32(-0.2), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # === Success: pyramid on grid adjacent to square ===
    pyr_on_grid = pyr_count_next > 0.5
    dist_pyr_to_sq = jnp.abs(pyr_y_next - sq_y) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_next - sq_x)
    success = pyr_on_grid & (~holding_next) & (dist_pyr_to_sq < 1.5) & (dist_pyr_to_sq > 0.4)
    success_reward = jnp.where(success, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # === Dense shaping ===
    # When not holding: reward progress toward pyramid
    # When holding: reward progress toward square
    dense_phase1 = (1.0 - holding_next_f) * progress_to_pyr * 1.0
    dense_phase2 = holding_next_f * progress_to_sq * 1.0

    # Additional dense: absolute distance rewards (small)
    # When holding, also reward being close to square
    close_to_sq = holding_next_f * (max_dist - dist_agent_to_sq_next) / max_dist * 0.1
    # When not holding, reward being close to pyramid
    close_to_pyr = (1.0 - holding_next_f) * (max_dist - dist_agent_to_pyr_next) / max_dist * 0.05

    total_reward = (
        dense_phase1
        + dense_phase2
        + close_to_sq
        + close_to_pyr
        + pickup_bonus
        + putdown_bonus
        + putdown_penalty
        + success_reward
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
